title: Caretaker's Spade
description: Add a Cyberpunk shovel to Minecraft!
body:
# **Cyberpunk Shovel** - **To obtain it, rename any shovel on the anvil "Caretaker's Spade". Works with Optifine or modification "[Cit Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)" (Fabric)** ### !!!Attention, this model is included in [this resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cyberpack)!!! ![Caretaker's Spade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gsqUoMFl/images/7d0ecb49d10d94379f5a4b8463424e64edb10082.png) ![REPLACE ME WITH YOUR ALT TEXT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gsqUoMFl/images/37d3069480b1dd03dcb647df666cb835e3384e50.png) ![REPLACE ME WITH YOUR ALT TEXT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gsqUoMFl/images/3dd7764597ad42192268ca4269804fbb447dc662.png) # **Social**

# **Support the project**
